questionHtml:
Which oxides produce an acidic solution when added to water?

I.    Al2O3 and SiO2

II.   P4O6 and P4O10

III.  NO2 and SO2

 

A.   I and II only

B.   I and III only

C.   II and III only

D.   I, II and III

meta.title: Which oxides produce an acidic solution when added to water? I. Al2O3 and SiO2 II. P4O6 and P4O10 III. NO2 and SO2 A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II an
